mapper.sql: SELECT r.review_id, r.order_id, o.product_id, o.buyer_id, u.name AS buyer_name, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM reviews r JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.order_id JOIN users u ON o.buyer_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews(order_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: WHERE o.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY r.review_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
